label: PLN+ mural cell
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) identifies 'PLN+ mural cell' as a fine-grained annotation under the broad 'Mural cell' category in prenatal skin (Supplementary Table 3, cell_type_annotations.json). PLN (phospholamban) is a calcium signaling regulator typically associated with smooth muscle contractile function. This likely represents a vascular smooth muscle cell-like mural cell subtype.
